query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME 
FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE 
WHERE REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME = 'users' 
AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME 
FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE 
WHERE REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME = 'users' 
AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
